content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "預約門診",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，我想預約門診。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng yùyuē ménzhěn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 yu4yue1 men2zhen3.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to book a clinic appointment.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 진료 예약을 하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，請問您要預約哪個時段？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐngwèn nín yào yùyuē nǎge shíduàn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3wen4 nin2 yao4 yu4yue1 na3ge shi2duan4?",
          "translation_en": "Sure, which time slot would you like to book?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 어떤 시간대로 예약하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "下個星期二上午，可以嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Xià ge xīngqí'èr shàngwǔ, kěyǐ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xia4 ge xing1qi2er4 shang4wu3, ke3yi3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Next Tuesday morning, is that okay?",
          "translation_ko": "다음 주 화요일 오전에 가능할까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "可以，那個時段有空檔。請給我您的名字和電話。",
          "pinyin": "Kěyǐ, nàge shíduàn yǒu kòngdǎng. Qǐng gěi wǒ nín de míngzì hé diànhuà.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ke3yi3, na4ge shi2duan4 you3 kong4dang3. Qing3 gei3 wo3 nin2 de ming2zi4 he2 dian4hua4.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, that slot is available. Please give me your name and phone number.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 그 시간대에 자리가 있습니다. 성함과 전화번호를 알려주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我叫王小明，電話是零九一二三四五六七八。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ jiào Wáng Xiǎomíng, diànhuà shì líng jiǔ yī èr sān sì wǔ liù qī bā.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 jiao4 Wang2 Xiao3ming2, dian4hua4 shi4 ling2 jiu3 yi1 er4 san1 si4 wu3 liu4 qi1 ba1.",
          "translation_en": "My name is Wang Xiaoming, and my phone number is 0912-345-678.",
          "translation_ko": "제 이름은 왕샤오밍이고, 전화번호는 0912-345-678입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，我幫您安排。預約號碼是八十八號。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ bāng nín ānpái. Yùyuē hàomǎ shì bāshíbā hào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 bang1 nin2 an1pai2. Yu4yue1 hao4ma3 shi4 ba1shi2ba1 hao4.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I'll arrange it for you. Your appointment number is 88.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 예약을 도와드리겠습니다. 예약 번호는 88번입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝，麻煩你了。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè, máfan nǐ le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie4, ma2fan ni3 le.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I appreciate your help.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 수고하셨습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What time slot did the customer book?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 어떤 시간대를 예약했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Next Tuesday afternoon", "Next Tuesday morning", "This Tuesday morning"],
          "options_ko": ["다음 주 화요일 오후", "다음 주 화요일 오전", "이번 주 화요일 오전"],
          "correct_index": 1
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '預約' and '時段'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice booking an appointment for a clinic. Use the phrases: '我想預約', '哪個時段', and '有空檔'."
    },
    {
      "title": "改時間",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，我想改時間。",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎoyìsi, wǒ xiǎng gǎi shíjiān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3yi4si, wo3 xiang3 gai3 shi2jian1.",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, I'd like to change the time.",
          "translation_ko": "죄송합니다, 시간을 변경하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "沒問題，請問您要改到什麼時候？",
          "pinyin": "Méi wèntí, qǐngwèn nín yào gǎi dào shénme shíhòu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Mei2 wen4ti2, qing3wen4 nin2 yao4 gai3 dao4 shen2me shi2hou4?",
          "translation_en": "No problem, when would you like to reschedule to?",
          "translation_ko": "문제없습니다, 언제로 변경하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "原本是下個星期二上午，可以改到星期三下午嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Yuánběn shì xià ge xīngqí'èr shàngwǔ, kěyǐ gǎi dào xīngqísān xiàwǔ ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yuan2ben3 shi4 xia4 ge xing1qi2er4 shang4wu3, ke3yi3 gai3 dao4 xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Originally it was next Tuesday morning, can I change it to Wednesday afternoon?",
          "translation_ko": "원래는 다음 주 화요일 오전이었는데, 수요일 오후로 변경할 수 있을까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我幫您看一下。星期三下午有空檔，可以改期。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bāng nín kàn yīxià. Xīngqísān xiàwǔ yǒu kòngdǎng, kěyǐ gǎiqī.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bang1 nin2 kan4 yi1xia4. Xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 you3 kong4dang3, ke3yi3 gai3qi1.",
          "translation_en": "Let me check for you. Wednesday afternoon is available, so we can reschedule.",
          "translation_ko": "확인해 드리겠습니다. 수요일 오후에 자리가 있어서 변경 가능합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "太好了，那就改到星期三下午。",
          "pinyin": "Tài hǎo le, nà jiù gǎi dào xīngqísān xiàwǔ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Tai4 hao3 le, na4 jiu4 gai3 dao4 xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3.",
          "translation_en": "Great, then let's change it to Wednesday afternoon.",
          "translation_ko": "좋아요, 그럼 수요일 오후로 변경하겠습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，我已經幫您改好了。新的預約時間是星期三下午兩點。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, wǒ yǐjīng bāng nín gǎi hǎo le. Xīn de yùyuē shíjiān shì xīngqísān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, wo3 yi3jing1 bang1 nin2 gai3 hao3 le. Xin1 de yu4yue1 shi2jian1 shi4 xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3.",
          "translation_en": "Okay, I've changed it for you. The new appointment time is Wednesday at 2 PM.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 변경 완료했습니다. 새로운 예약 시간은 수요일 오후 2시입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "謝謝，麻煩你了。",
          "pinyin": "Xièxiè, máfan nǐ le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xie4xie4, ma2fan ni3 le.",
          "translation_en": "Thank you, I appreciate your help.",
          "translation_ko": "감사합니다, 수고하셨습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What was the original appointment time?",
          "question_ko": "원래 예약 시간은 언제였습니까?",
          "options_en": ["Next Tuesday morning", "Next Wednesday afternoon", "Next Tuesday afternoon"],
          "options_ko": ["다음 주 화요일 오전", "다음 주 수요일 오후", "다음 주 화요일 오후"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '改時間' and '改期'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice changing an appointment. Use the phrases: '我想改時間', '改到', and '有空檔'."
    },
    {
      "title": "確認預約",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "你好，我想確認一下我的預約。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ hǎo, wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià wǒ de yùyuē.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 hao3, wo3 xiang3 que4ren4 yi1xia4 wo3 de yu4yue1.",
          "translation_en": "Hello, I'd like to confirm my appointment.",
          "translation_ko": "안녕하세요, 제 예약을 확인하고 싶습니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好的，請給我您的預約號碼。",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng gěi wǒ nín de yùyuē hàomǎ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 gei3 wo3 nin2 de yu4yue1 hao4ma3.",
          "translation_en": "Sure, please give me your appointment number.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 예약 번호를 알려주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "預約號碼是八十八號。",
          "pinyin": "Yùyuē hàomǎ shì bāshíbā hào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Yu4yue1 hao4ma3 shi4 ba1shi2ba1 hao4.",
          "translation_en": "The appointment number is 88.",
          "translation_ko": "예약 번호는 88번입니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "我幫您查一下。您的預約是下個星期三下午兩點，對嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ bāng nín chá yīxià. Nín de yùyuē shì xià ge xīngqísān xiàwǔ liǎng diǎn, duì ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 bang1 nin2 cha2 yi1xia4. Nin2 de yu4yue1 shi4 xia4 ge xing1qi2san1 xia4wu3 liang3 dian3, dui4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Let me check for you. Your appointment is next Wednesday at 2 PM, correct?",
          "translation_ko": "확인해 드리겠습니다. 예약이 다음 주 수요일 오후 2시 맞습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "對，沒有問題。謝謝你。",
          "pinyin": "Duì, méi yǒu wèntí. Xièxiè nǐ.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4, mei2 you3 wen4ti2. Xie4xie4 ni3.",
          "translation_en": "Yes, that's correct. Thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "네, 맞습니다. 감사합니다."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不客氣，請準時到。",
          "pinyin": "Bú kèqì, qǐng zhǔnshí dào.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu2 ke4qi4, qing3 zhun3shi2 dao4.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome, please arrive on time.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요, 정시에 도착해 주세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What is the confirmed appointment time?",
          "question_ko": "확인된 예약 시간은 언제입니까?",
          "options_en": ["Next Wednesday at 2 PM", "Next Tuesday at 2 PM", "Next Wednesday at 3 PM"],
          "options_ko": ["다음 주 수요일 오후 2시", "다음 주 화요일 오후 2시", "다음 주 수요일 오후 3시"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on the pronunciation of '確認' and '預約號碼'.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Practice confirming an appointment. Use the phrases: '我想確認', '預約號碼', and '沒有問題'."
    }
  ]
}
